quotes.text: Hatred is never appeased by hatred in this world. By non-hatred alone is hatred appeased. This is an eternal law.
All conditioned things are impermanent. When one sees this with wisdom, one turns away from suffering.
You yourself must strive. The Buddhas only point the way.
Just as a solid rock is not shaken by the wind, so the wise are not moved by praise or blame.
Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth, faithfulness the best relationship.
